message:
test(rchd): Add test_guard instrumentation across all daemon unit tests

Instrument all rchd unit tests with test_guard! macro for structured
test execution logging, enabling:

- Test phase tracking in target/test-logs/ JSONL files
- Performance regression detection via scripts/check_test_regression.py
- Better debugging of test failures with execution timing
- CI integration for automated test monitoring

Affected modules:
- api.rs: Request parsing and handler tests
- benchmark_queue.rs: Build queue management tests
- config.rs: Configuration loading tests
- events.rs: Event system tests
- health.rs: Health check tests
- history.rs: Build history tracking tests
- metrics/: Budget, latency, tracing, and aggregate metrics tests
- reload.rs: Hot reload tests
- selection.rs: Worker selection algorithm tests
- self_test.rs: Self-test service tests
- telemetry.rs: Telemetry collection tests
- ui/: Banner, jobs, metrics, shutdown, and workers UI tests

Each test now creates a guard that logs test start/end with timing
information, building the dataset needed for regression detection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
